official_project_page.note: Mutable official project page acquired at review time; used only to resolve the paper-linked GitHub and Hugging Face releases.

paper_time_commit.timing_boundary: Commit predates arXiv v1 publication by about 20 hours and is the closest public repository snapshot at paper time.

acquisition_time_commit.message: Add drug discovery (dd) evaluation suite under evaluations/dd
acquisition_time_commit.timing_boundary: Commit postdates arXiv v1 by 11 days and adds the inspectable 79-task drug-discovery suite; it is not treated as manuscript-time implementation evidence.

official_huggingface.public_readme_normalization: One redundant trailing blank line was removed after acquisition; all card content and the terminal newline are preserved.
official_huggingface.access_boundary: The API metadata and README were anonymously accessible, but immutable-revision downloads for representative question workbooks/CSVs in drug discovery, EHR, genetics, single-cell, and spatial domains returned HTTP 401 because the dataset is auto-gated. No gated task/data bytes are claimed as inspected.

release_audit.paper_time_observation: The 91d7fcf snapshot contains agent setup material; one cross-domain eQTL evaluator and two tiny target/EHR notes; two genetics checking notebooks; one single-cell notebook; one spatial notebook; and a generic front end. It does not contain the later evaluations/dd suite or a self-contained full paper-result reproduction package.
release_audit.post_v1_observation: The ce27b8c snapshot adds a unified drug-discovery CLI, task registry, runners, scorers, ground truth, examples, and 79 JSON task definitions: C1=18, C2=26, C3=10, C4=6, C5=19. This conflicts with v1 Methods' 78 total and C1=17 while reconciling the abstract's approximately-200 count to 197 typed tasks when combined with 27 single-cell, 26 spatial, five EHR task types, 57 genetics tasks, and three cross-domain tasks.
release_audit.execution_scope: Static release audit only. No proprietary model/API rerun and no gated-dataset execution were attempted.
